_comment: Server bootstrap seed data. Cards reference definitions by their string id (matches data/cards/*.json). Spawn semantics mirror debug_spawn: panel placement by default; world placement when q/r/layer is set; stacked_on attaches the card UP onto the parent. World entities use z=32 (WORLD_LAYER_GROUND); panel cards omit z. All non-soul cards spawn with CARD_FLAG_STACKABLE; soul cards get CARD_FLAG_POSITION_HOLD via upsert_player.
